name: ucast-library-evaluation
description: @ucast ecosystem evaluation for Query AST Format. Tested @ucast/core, @ucast/mongo, @ucast/js against all requirements (AST-01 through AST-05). All 30 tests pass covering: comparison operators, logical operators with nesting, JSON serialization roundtrip, TypeScript types, extensibility for custom operators ($contains), and in-memory execution.
relevantCode: MongoQueryParser from @ucast/mongo parses MongoDB-style queries into Condition AST (FieldCondition, CompoundCondition). Custom operators added via parsing instructions. @ucast/js provides createJsInterpreter for in-memory execution.
recommendation: ADOPT @ucast ecosystem. Option C (Hybrid): Use @ucast internally for AST and parsing, expose MongoDB-style API externally. Rationale: (1) Battle-tested parse-compile separation, (2) Extensible for custom operators like $contains, (3) Pairs with @ucast/js for memory backend and @ucast/sql for SQL backend, (4) MongoDB API is already JSON-serializable.
